summary: End-to-end Playwright frontend testing of RISEDUAL Mission Control monorepo against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. All 16 features in the review request verified PASS. Login (success + wrong-password error), Bearer token persistence in localStorage (key 'risedual_access_token'), observation banner, sidebar nav (8 Shared + 3 Runtimes), Overview runtime cards (Alpha/Camaro/Chevelle with MODE=OBSERVATION, ENFORCE=DISABLED, artifact version, receipt count, memory-label count, last-signal relative time, colored top borders), Doctrine card ('Merge the infrastructure. Do not merge the brains.'), Flags strip (4 flags all FALSE), Receipts table with all 7 columns + 45 rows + OBSERVED status badges + working alpha/camaro/chevelle filters, Memory Firewall with safe/review/quarantine badges + working runtime+label filters (12 filtered rows when alpha selected), Calibration grouped by 3 runtimes, Feature Builders grid with deterministic badge, Artifacts grouped by 3 runtimes (ALPHA/CAMARO/CHEVELLE) showing version + sha + timestamp, Diagnostics (Mongo ONLINE, OBSERVATION mode, server time), Flags page (broker control + 3 runtime cards each DISABLED), Runtime detail pages for /runtime/alpha (RISEDUAL-AI-2), /runtime/camaro (RD4_0421), /runtime/chevelle (2.1-APP) all rendering project name in header + Mode/Enforce/Records/Doctrine status cards + isolated decision-store table + per-runtime calibrators+artifacts. Token persists across hard reload of /. Logout clears localStorage and redirects to /login; subsequent / access redirects back to /login.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes from the spec are present and resolvable (login-page, login-error, login-submit, observation-banner, runtime-card-alpha/-camaro/-chevelle, logout-button).

Auth flow is consistent end-to-end: POST /api/auth/login returns access_token, frontend stores it in localStorage under 'risedual_access_token', axios interceptor in /app/frontend/src/lib/api.js attaches Authorization: Bearer header on every request, /api/auth/me succeeds on hard reload (token persistence verified).
Wrong-password path correctly surfaces backend's 401 'Invalid email or password' message via data-testid='login-error' and stays on /login.
Logout properly clears localStorage (token === null after click) and Protected wrapper in App.js correctly redirects unauthenticated GET / to /login.

Visual style matches spec — dark mode terminal (#0A0A0A/#111111), JetBrains Mono, sharp borders, no rounded corners. Per-runtime accent colors visible as top borders on Overview cards: Alpha blue (#3B82F6), Camaro amber (#F59E0B), Chevelle green (#10B981). Status badges (OBSERVED green, DISABLED neutral, OBSERVATION amber, SAFE green, REVIEW amber, QUARANTINE red) all render correctly.

Doctrine integrity preserved in UI: Overview Doctrine card explicitly states 'Merge the infrastructure. Do not merge the brains.' and 'Separate model artifacts & calibrators / Separate execution authority & broker controls'. Runtime detail pages show project-specific subdoctrine fields (decision_log_count for alpha, shadow_rows_count for camaro, memory_labels_count for chevelle).
Receipts filter is implemented client-side and works correctly — selecting 'alpha' reduces visible rows from 45 to 15 and all 15 rows contain 'alpha' in their runtime cell.

Observation invariant enforced visually — every receipt row shows an OBSERVED status badge; Flags page shows 5 DISABLED badges (1 broker + 3 runtime authority + 1 implicit), all 4 flags in Overview strip render FALSE.
No console errors observed during full navigation flow except expected 401 on the wrong-password attempt.

Sidebar nav structure matches spec exactly: 8 SHARED items (Overview, ADL Receipts, Memory Firewall, Calibration, Feature Builders, Artifacts, Diagnostics, Runtime Flags) + 3 RUNTIMES items (Alpha, Camaro, Chevelle) with colored runtime swatches.
seed_data_creation: None. Backend seed verified producing 5 feature builders, 6 calibrators, 6 artifacts (2 per runtime), 45 ADL receipts (15 per runtime), 36 memory labels (12 per runtime).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend is fully green against the public preview URL. Bearer auth with 'risedual_access_token' localStorage key is the canonical flow. All 16 spec features verified. Visual screenshots captured under .screenshots/ for the login page, overview, memory firewall, artifacts. If retesting, note: filter buttons on Receipts/Memory pages render in lowercase ('alpha','camaro','chevelle','all'); table rendering on Memory page uses card/row divs (not tbody>tr) — use innerText scraping or data-testid for row-count assertions. Wrong-password message is 'Invalid email or password' surfaced via data-testid='login-error'.
rca of the issue: No issues found. App matches spec on first frontend test pass.
